summary.text: Fundamental and historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP.

overview.description: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories worldwide. The company offers iPhone, a line of smartphones; Mac, a line of personal computers; iPad, a line of multi-purpose tablets; and wearables, home, and accessories comprising AirPods, Apple Vision Pro, Apple TV, Apple Watch, Beats products, and HomePod, as well as Apple branded and third-party accessories. It also provides AppleCare support and cloud services; and operates various platforms, including the App Store that all...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Apple's revenue was $416.16 billion, an increase of 6.43% compared to the previous year's $391.04 billion. Earnings were $112.01 billion, an increase of 19.50%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 47 analysts, the average rating for AAPL stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $318.25, which is a decrease of -4.64% from the latest price.

data.title: Apple briefly overtakes Nvidia as world's most valuable company amid AI investment doubts
data.text: Apple briefly overtook Nvidia as the world's most valuable company Friday before the AI chip giant reclaimed its $4.92 trillion market cap by closing bell.

data.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify' apps from App Stores
data.text: The city of San Francisco has ordered Apple and Google to remove dozens of “nudify” apps — — software programs that can digitally alter pictures to unclothe the people in them — from their app stores.

data.title: Berkshire's Equity Portfolio Is Rallying, but the Apple Sales Still Sting
data.text: Berkshire Hathaway's biggest stock holdings have added more than $20 billion in value this quarter, but Warren Buffett's decision to slash the Apple stake continues to weigh on the portfolio's upside.
